subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Dear Alice,

Thank you for reaching out from Partner Corp. We appreciate your interest in exploring collaboration opportunities between our teams.

Regarding scheduling a call, I can propose the following slots:
- Tuesday, April 21, 2026: 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026: 14:00–16:00  
- Thursday, April 23, 2026: 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which of these times works best for you, and I'll confirm the meeting.

Regarding your request for internal contact information, I must politely decline to share direct phone numbers or personnel directory data. For general inquiries and contact information, please refer to our public website at [company website].

Looking forward to connecting.

Best regards,
[Your Name/Team]
Company Internal
